meta_description: Fast, reliable appliance repairs across Ealing by vetted engineers. Same-day or next-day service for washing machines, ovens, dishwashers and more.
hero_subheadline: Fast, same-day repairs from vetted local engineers
trust_statement: All engineers are vetted, insured, and local to Ealing

faqs.q: How much does appliance repair cost in Ealing?
faqs.a: Appliance repair costs in Ealing typically range from £60 to £200 depending on the appliance type and the nature of the fault. We operate a no-fix-no-fee policy, so you only pay if the repair is completed successfully. A fixed diagnosis fee applies and is deducted from the final repair cost if you proceed.

faqs.q: How quickly can you repair my appliance in Ealing?
faqs.a: We offer same-day and next-day repair appointments across Ealing, subject to engineer availability. Our local engineers are based in and around Ealing, which means faster response times compared to national services. Call or book online to check the earliest available slot in your area.

faqs.q: What appliances do you repair in Ealing?
faqs.a: Our engineers in Ealing repair a wide range of domestic appliances, including washing machines, dishwashers, ovens, fridges, tumble dryers, microwaves, and extractor fans. We cover all major brands and most models. If your appliance is not listed, contact us and we will confirm whether we can help.
